productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Tolero Black Casual Shoes
description: It's not just looks, but innovative design and lightweight construction that makes the puma Cell Tolero an instant hit.UpperSynthetic leather upper with puma Formstripe on the sides for absolute durability, stability and comfortPerforations on the midfoot with a meshed and cushioned tongue for enhanced breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitCushioned and meshed tongue and collar for breathable comfortPadded and moulded sockliner for superior cushioning and supportMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectiontanCELL technology in the heel for superior shock absorptionOutsolePVC-free rubber outsole with modified waffle pattern lugs on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and tractionErgonomically curved midfoot for ease of movement
